name: InputField
description: Labeled single-line text field with optional hint, error, clear action, and leading/trailing icons. Extends HTML input attributes (except native size).

props.name: error
props.description: Error message — puts the field in error state.

props.name: clearable
props.description: Show a clear button when input has value.

props.name: onClear
props.description: Callback when clear button is clicked.

props.name: iconEnd
props.description: Trailing icon inside the input (replaced by clear icon when clearable + filled).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the root element. Layout composition only — do NOT use for custom styling.

states.rationale: InputField hover changes border color only (no background shift). Error and disabled states swap to dedicated L4 and L2 tokens. No OKLCH shift or overlay technique is used for hover/pressed backgrounds.

keyboard.Escape: No default — consumer may wire to clear or blur

propertyMapping.note: Visual-only Figma property. In code, states come from CSS pseudo-classes (:hover, :focus-within) and data attributes (data-error, data-disabled).
Figma 'text' maps to the HTML input 'value' attribute passed through InputFieldProps.
Figma 'error' is a boolean toggling the error row. In code, 'error' is a string — truthy string = error state and displays the message.
Figma 'errorText' content maps to the React 'error' string prop value.

useWhen: Single-line text entry with label, hint, and/or error feedback
Search or filter inputs that need a clear action
Fields that benefit from leading/trailing icon affordances

knownDeviations.description: Figma 'field' component does not include label or hint rows. In code, InputField renders label, field, and hint/error as a single component. Label and hint are code-only props with no Figma property counterpart.
